title: FeatureSpec
description: Normalized specification artifact for a feature under test. Produced by normalize_intake workflow step.

feature_id.description: Unique identifier for the feature, e.g., 'ORD-CANCEL-01'. Should be uppercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

title.description: Human-readable feature title in Japanese or English.

summary.description: Brief description of the feature's purpose and behavior. Optional but recommended.

actors.description: List of user roles or system actors involved in the feature, e.g., ['buyer', 'admin', 'system'].

acceptance_criteria.description: Acceptance criteria (AC) statements. Each should be testable and atomic. Required field.

business_rules.description: Business rules (BR) that constrain the feature behavior. Optional but important for coverage.

changed_areas.description: Code areas, services, or components affected by the change. Used for regression analysis.

source_refs.description: References to source documents (spec, AC, rules). Required for traceability.

assumptions.description: Assumptions made when information is missing. Each must have severity level.
